text: Getting stuck in quicksand really seemed like a big deal in old cartoons. I don't think I've even seen quicksand. author: @GiMck-u5j

text: What they don't tell you about this segment is that there is no good guy, only bad guys everybody present is the bad guy including Sonic The Hedgehog! First off; the sloth family, mother, father and sister don't seem to be bothered by the sight of someone dying right in front of them and just keep walking, meanwhile, Tails is the one dying in quicksand, but just seconds before that happened he did insult the family walking by, so it served him right. Meanwhile, the son sloth that does come to Tails' aid: does it as slowly as possible; Tails could have gone all the way under before the son sloth finished talking and what kind of rescue was that anyways?! Just talk to him about not panicking and going nice and slow, don't extend a branch for him or anything. As for Sonic, he's more than happy to let Tails drown in quicksand; even though that's his best friend he wouldn't lend a hand to save him from drowning like a  Phil Collins song. that, and I guess the only thing that the sloth family know that's fast is QUICKSAND! 🤣😂😅😆
author: @GiMck-u5j

text: What this Sonic Seyz doesn't tell you is @ the 0:28 mark, Tails isn't interested in shaking hands with the sloth, he's using all his willpower not to fling that sloth right into the quicksand for revenge!
author: @GiMck-u5j

text: Sloth's parents wouldn't lend a hand to Tails unless Tails promises to change his ways permanently. Sloth on the other hand, he'll lend a hand of instructions as slowly as possible! One more thing, at the end Tails is resisting the urge not to fling the sloth into the quicksand!
author: @GiMck-u5j

text:
Jesus Christ is coming back to Earth very soon! If you want to spend eternity in the Kingdom of Heaven, you must recognize that you are a sinner on your way to Hell (Romans 3:23), and that you are in need of a savior (Romans 6:23). Over 2000 years ago, Jesus lived a perfect life and died on the Cross of Calvery to atone all of your sins (John 3:16). All you have to do to be saved is trust in his shed blood on the Cross of Calvery as your only hope of Heaven (John 6:40). Once you do this, you are sealed by the Holy Spirit until the day of redemption.

John 3:16 - "For God so loved the world, that he gave his only begotten Son, that whosoever believeth in him should not perish, but have everlasting life."

Ephesians 2:8-9 - "For by grace are ye saved through faith; and that not of yourselves: it is the gift of God: Not of works, lest any man should boast."

John 6:40 - "And this is the will of him that sent me, that every one which seeth the Son, and believeth on him, may have everlasting life: and I will raise him up at the last day."

Acts 16:31 - "And they said, Believe on the Lord Jesus Christ, and thou shalt be saved, and thy house."

Acts 10:43 - "To him give all the prophets witness, that through his name whosoever believeth in him shall receive remission of sins."

John 11:26 - "And whosoever liveth and believeth in me shall never die. Believest thou this?"

1 Corinthians 15:1-4 - "Moreover, brethren, I declare unto you the gospel which I preached unto you, which also ye have received, and wherein ye stand; By which also ye are saved, if ye keep in memory what I preached unto you, unless ye have believed in vain. For I delivered unto you first of all that which I also received, how that Christ died for our sins according to the scriptures; And that he was buried, and that he rose again the third day according to the scriptures."                                   ..

text:
@XxCalypsoxX616 

I have another way to put it. Look at Ben Stein. He is the slowest-talking person in America but he beats a lot of people in brainpower. You gonna call him retarded? Still, thanks for telling me to learn to analyze a video for little kids. I mean you're looking too far into it. This is for KIDS, remember? Sonic spends so much time bragging about his speed, and this is basically a way to tell kids not to get a big head over their strengths. That's all.
author: @AstronAstroll

text:
@XxCalypsoxX616 

"Retarded" is one of those bastardized words that lost its original meaning because people used it in the wrong way. Instead of referring to ACTUAL retards with it they chose to use the word on people who talk and move slowly (which, again, if you go by that then most people are retarded), and people who may be good at a few things but suck at others. It's a great example of why the English language is fucked.
author: @AstronAstroll

@AstronAstroll How in the HELL did he he show that he is "smart" That word is thrown around WAAAAAY too much nowadays and frankly, when you overuse that word it loses its meaning. This isn't saying some people are slower than others its talking about retarded people (literally) in the form of them being sloths and "slow"
Learn your how to analyze a video for little kids otherwise people are gonna start giving you a lot of shit on YouTube.
